message:
fix: correct commit/contribution counts to include all-time + private

Previous values only counted public commits from the last year.
Commits: 34,068 → 59,306 (all-time, public + private)
Contributions: 54,086 → 60,233 (all-time, all types)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     </svg>
     <text x="24" y="13" fill="#c9d1d9" font-family="'Segoe UI', Ubuntu, sans-serif" font-size="14">Total Commits:</text>
-    <text x="200" y="13" fill="#58a6ff" font-family="'Segoe UI', Ubuntu, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="14">34,068</text>
+    <text x="200" y="13" fill="#58a6ff" font-family="'Segoe UI', Ubuntu, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="14">59,306</text>
   </g>
